x-enumeration-literals.name: Annual
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event takes place every year or once a year.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Monthly
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event takes place every month or once a month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Quarterly
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event takes place every three months or four times a year.

x-enumeration-literals.name: SemiAnnual
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event takes place every six months or two times a year.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Weekly
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event takes place once a week.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adhoc
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event takes place on request or as necessary.

x-enumeration-literals.name: IntraDay
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event takes place several times a day.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TenDays
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event takes place every ten business days.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fortnightly
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event takes place every two weeks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TriggeredByMovement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event takes place at the end of the day if there was a movement on the account, otherwise nothing is sent that day.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rate
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event takes place based on a change of a rate.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OnCreditEvent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event occurs due to a credit event occurring for an issuer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Upfront
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event that takes place at the initiation of a trade or agreement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OnExpiry
x-enumeration-literals.description: Event occurs on expiry of a financial contract.
